facebook.caption:
Fresh seafood for $15-30 a person. On Trần Hưng Đạo. In Phu Quoc.

Nhà hàng Nét Việt Phú Quốc pulls a 4.5★ across 190 reviews and the price tag still hasn't caught up with the quality. Grilled, steamed, sauced. Real Vietnamese seafood done right, not resort-priced.

Book a table before dinner rush hits. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: 4.5 stars. 190 reviews. Under $30 a head. Watch what lands on the table at Nhà hàng Nét Việt Phú Quốc and tell me this isn't the move.
